content: TP-182 remains genuinely blocked. I re-read PROMPT.md and STATUS.md and confirmed the execution snapshot still lacks the prompt-scoped implementation sources required for every remaining step: `dashboard/server.cjs`, `dashboard/public/index.html`, `dashboard/public/app.js`, `dashboard/public/style.css`, `extensions/taskplane/discovery.ts`, and `extensions/taskplane/types.ts`. STATUS.md already records the exact verification commands/results and is set to `🚧 Blocked`. Please restage the missing source tree or re-scope the task; otherwise no further in-scope implementation progress is possible.
